creator: kachan@vicosys.com.hk
text:
I tried to install Expect from the port collection and with the following errors.
/home/terence/expect
hydrogen# make install
"Makefile", line 31: Could not find bsd.port.pre.mk
"Makefile", line 33: Malformed conditional (${PORTOBJFORMAT} == "elf")
"Makefile", line 33: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 35: if-less else
"Makefile", line 35: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 37: if-less endif
"Makefile", line 37: Need an operator
"Makefile", line 43: Could not find bsd.port.post.mk
make: fatal errors encountered -- cannot continue      

tcl 8.1a2 has been installed.
